source: CFPB HMDA loan-level FHA 2023-2025, 75 lenders with valid cliff vectors all 3 years
method: KMeans clustering on cliff-geometry space (DTI_cliff × CLTV_cliff), NOT denial level. StandardScaler + silhouette-optimal k=3.
key_finding: Archetype persistence 81% across 3 years: lender underwriting geometry is a stable institutional property, not a market-condition artifact

FLAT.description: Consistent low denial across DTI and CLTV bands — no overlay cliffs detectable

CLTV_dominant.description: Sharp denial jump at CLTV 85 — profile-dependent cliff, stable across years

CLTV_dominant_severe.description: Extreme CLTV sensitivity — highest cliff magnitude in dataset

limitation: DTI cliff not captured in this vector (integer-DTI coverage limits variance); CLTV geometry dominates. Cliff-space clustering cannot distinguish FLAT from DTI-dominant lenders.
